task: Implement the Countdown Prelaunch page at /count-down-prelaunch from the MoMorph design (screen 8PJQswPZmU), backed by local Supabase (event_settings.launch_at), with a pre-launch navigation lock and at-zero redirect
acceptanceCriteria: countdown page renders DAYS/HOURS/MINUTES ticking to launch_at
nav lock redirects other routes before launch and lifts after
at-zero client redirect to home fires once
DB-down fail-open: no lock and static 00 display
blastRadius: auth-gate redirects for existing routes (login, home-page-saa, profile)
public anonymous access to the countdown page
